top_signals.title: China Power Load Hits Early Record as Data, EV Demand Rises
top_signals.summary: China’s nationwide electricity load reached a record high for the first time this year on July 10, hitting 1.518 billion kilowatts, the National Energy Administration said in a statement posted on its official WeChat account Saturday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta stock got the 18% pop Jim Cramer said it could on cloud news. What's next?
top_signals.summary: Investors are also celebrating Meta's launch Thursday of Muse Spark 1.1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
